_README: Single source of truth for the LogueOS worker roster. To swap a worker (e.g. gemini -> agy), edit that entry's label/model/color/dispatchName/terminal and add the old name to 'aliases', then run windows/sync_worker_terminals.ps1. To add a worker, append a new entry. NEVER rename an existing 'id' -- it is a stable slot key that logs, costs, and history reference; 'aliases' is what keeps old data resolving after a model swap. Consumed by src/lib/config/workers.ts, windows/start_https.js, and windows/sync_worker_terminals.ps1.
